title: Question
description: Schema for a trick question with judge prompt or judge function

question.description: The trick question to ask the AI model

judgePrompt.description: The prompt to use when judging the answer with an LLM judge

judgeFunction.description: Key into the judgeFunctions map in data/judgeFunctions.ts. When set, the JS function is used instead of an LLM judge.

tokenLimit.description: Optional maximum number of tokens for the response
